title.description: Optional title prefix; defaults to variant label, set to "" to suppress

text.description: Body text (single paragraph). Inline markup applies.

spacing_before.description: Override the vertical space above this block. Plain-unit LaTeX dimension string ('1em', '0.5cm', '0em'). Macro-based dimensions ('\baselineskip') are not supported — backslashes are escaped like in all other strings. Not validated beyond that — an invalid dimension fails at compile time. Wins over block_settings and the built-in default.

spacing_after.description: Override the vertical space below this block. Same semantics as spacing_before.
